name: GDS read-through with cache
when: Fetching inventory from a GDS (search results, seat maps, availability calendars) where GDS responses take 3-10s and session budgets are constrained
why: Reading from a short-TTL cache first (seat maps ~30s, hotel search ~5 min, availability calendars ~15 min) and falling through to the GDS only on miss preserves GDS session budgets, keeps p95 latency tolerable, and is invalidated on booking events to stay correct
